title: Thai Gelatin Dessert with German Fruit
description: A refreshing and light dessert inspired by Thai cuisine, using German gelatin and rich fruit.
instructions: Soak the German gelatin sheets in water for 5 minutes.
Combine the sugar, gelatin flavor, and coconut milk in a saucepan.
Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
In a separate bowl, whip the coconut milk until it thickens.
Add the whipped coconut milk to the saucepan and stir until combined.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
Add the pineapple, mango, and lime juice to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until set.
Top with grilled coconut flakes and serve chilled.
